results.title: AI Engineer (F/H/X)
results.description:
Rejoindre l’aventure Verisure, c’est choisir un métier avec une mission collective, **celle de protéger. C’est d’ailleurs pour cela que chez Verisure, on aime appeler nos clients « nos protégés ».**

Dans le cadre de notre développement, nous recherchons aujourd’hui un.e **IA Engineer (F/H/X)** au sein de la **Direction Administrative et Financière.** Rattaché.e au Lead Data Science \& IA, vous serez notre expert.e IA pour les différents secteurs d’activité et collaborerez étroitement avec les équipes d’intelligence artificielle de notre groupe technologique. Vous concevrez et déploierez des solutions d’IA internes à fort impact, construirez des pipelines robustes et transformerez les besoins métier en systèmes performants, fiables et optimisés.

 **Vos missions principales seront les suivantes :**

 **AI \& Développement de modèles**

* Concevoir, entraîner et évaluer des modèles de Machine Learning et Deep Learning pour des cas d’usage internes.
* Développer des composants GenAI (RAG, extraction d’information basée LLM, fine\-tuning).
* Mettre en œuvre des architectures hybrides ML \+ LLM pour la segmentation, la classification, la prévision ou le résumé de texte.
* Choisir l’architecture la plus adaptée (ML vs LLM) selon la valeur ajoutée réelle.
* Maîtriser les techniques avancées de prompting (prompts structurés, approche systématique, optimisation itérative)
* Une connaissance des technologies MCP serveur est un plus.

 **Pipeline \& Engineering**

* Concevoir des pipelines de bout en bout, industrialisables et robustes.
* Garantir reproductibilité, modularité et documentation claire.
* Développer des pipelines efficaces pour le prétraitement et l’évaluation.

 **Évaluation, tests \& maîtrise des coûts**

* Appliquer des méthodologies d’évaluation systématiques (benchmarks LLM, indicateurs de qualité, etc.).
* Surveiller les performances et dérives des pipelines.
* Optimiser les coûts : taille de modèles, quantification, batching, caching…

 **Collaboration avec Group****Technology**

* Préparer les ressources techniques nécessaires pour l’industrialisation par le Groupe si nécessaire (modèles, documentation, tests, API).
* Participer à la gouvernance et aux choix d’architecture.

 **Interaction métier (avec l’AI Product Manager)**

* Accompagner l’AI PM France dans l’analyse de faisabilité, des contraintes et de l’effort.
* Traduire les besoins métier en spécifications techniques.
* Expliquer clairement les compromis ML vs GenAI aux équipes non techniques.

**Compétences requises :**

 **Comp****é****tences techniques fondamentales**

* Forte expertise en Machine Learning, statistiques et évaluation de modèles.
* Solide compréhension des architectures Deep Learning (Transformers, CNN, RNN, embeddings).
* Expérience en GenAI engineering :
* RAG
* Prompt engineering structuré
* Fine\-tuning / adaptation de LLM
* Très bonne maîtrise de l’écosystème Python : PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face, MLflow, etc.
* Capacité à produire un code propre, robuste et maintenable.

 **Engineering \&****MLOps****Mindset**

* Maîtrise du versionnage, de la reproductibilité, des bonnes pratiques d’ingénierie.
* À l’aise dans la construction de pipelines.
* Connaissances CI/CD, supervision, Docker, APIs.

 **Bonus appréciés**

* Connaissance des frameworks d’évaluation : RAGAS, DeepEval, …
* Expérience cloud AWS, Snowflake (prétraitement, orchestration, stockage).
* Sensibilité aux contraintes de gouvernance et de sécurité IA en environnement entreprise.
* Connaissance des technologies MCP serveur.

**Profil recherché :**

* 2 à 5 ans d’expérience en tant qu’AI/ML engineer ou Data Scientist avec fort ADN engineering ;
* Passion pour la création de solutions IA fiables, pragmatiques, orientées valeur ;
* Curiosité, rigueur, sens de l’innovation responsable ;
* Capacité à vulgariser des concepts complexes ;
* Maîtrise de l'anglais indispensable (travail en équipe internationale).

**Rejoindre l’aventure Verisure, c’est :**

* Un contrat en **CDI** avec 1 jour de télétravail par semaine
* Une formation complète dès votre arrivée et tout au long de votre parcours
* Une prime annuelle d’intéressement et de participation, avec abondement de l’entreprise (environ un mois de salaire)
* Des perspectives d’évolution : **25% de nos collaborateurs** évoluent chaque année
* Le package complet : mutuelle, prévoyance, CSE, participation repas
* Intégrer une entreprise labelisée Top Employer depuis 2022, Happy Trainees depuis 2023 et Elu Service Client de l’année depuis 2024


Chez Verisure, nous sommes **des personnes** qui protégeons **des personnes**. Nous croyons profondément à la **bienveillance**, à la **générosité** et à **l’honnêteté**, sans lesquelles nous ne pourrions mener à bien notre mission.


Et même si vos expériences sont valorisées**, nous donnons la chance à tout le monde.** Parce qu’un monde plus sûr est forcément un monde plus juste, nous nous engageons à mener une politique de recrutement non discriminatoire. Verisure est une entreprise handi\-accueillante et handi\-bienveillante, nos postes sont évidemment ouverts aux personnes en situation de handicap.
results.company_description: Verisure, a fast growing company full of career opportunities. Verisure Belgium is part of a global organisation active in 14 countries.

results.title: ML/LLM Engineer / Python - CDI - Paris (F/H)
results.description:
**Qui sommes\-nous ?**


Tiime est une start\-up française créée en 2015\. Chez Tiime, nous développons LA super app pour entreprendre, au service des entrepreneurs et des experts\-comptables.


Côté entrepreneur, la super app regroupe un maximum de fonctionnalités pour gérer son entreprise au quotidien : facturation, achats, stockage des documents, compte pro. Le tout en 1 pour simplifier l'entrepreneuriat !


Côté expert\-comptable, Tiime propose le meilleur de la technologie en mettant à disposition des outils simples et puissants pour gagner en productivité, booster la croissance et repenser l'expérience client.


Précurseur en matière d'intelligence artificielle, Tiime est un acteur majeur de la digitalisation de la comptabilité et de la gestion financière des entreprises. À travers ses produits, Tiime sert aujourd'hui le quotidien de plus de 200 000 entrepreneurs et 2000 experts\-comptables.


Notre ambition ? Accompagner ⅓ des nouveaux créateurs d'entreprise en France et devenir le logiciel comptable leader du marché !


Ça te tente ? Rejoins notre aventure !

 **Ce qu'on te propose pour ce poste :**

  

* **Développer et optimiser** des solutions IA centrées autour des **Large Language Models**, notamment hébergés notamment via **AWS Bedrock** / Gemini

  

* Participer à la **création, l’entraînement et le fine\-tuning** de modèles de langage (via PyTorch ou TensorFlow), avec un focus sur l’**Embedding** et la **RAG** pour améliorer la pertinence et la contextualisation des réponses.

  

* Mettre en place des mécanismes d’**Agentic Orchestration** (ex. LangChain Agents, frameworks équivalents) pour permettre au LLM de prendre des décisions et d’accomplir des tâches complexes de manière autonome.

  

* **Implémenter et déployer** des pipelines de traitement de données et de textes (prétraitement, nettoyage, vectorisation, etc.) en utilisant Python.

  

* Concevoir et maintenir des **API** (REST ou GraphQL) pour l’inférence et la mise à disposition des modèles en production.

  

* Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les équipes DevOps et Data Engineering pour déployer les solutions sur le cloud (AWS, GCP ou Azure), en optimisant l’usage des ressources (GPU, TPU) et en assurant la **scalabilité**.

  

* Assurer une **veille technologique** continue et proposer des améliorations constantes (optimisation de l’architecture, choix de frameworks, bonnes pratiques MLOps).

 **Ce que nous pouvons t'apporter :**

* Un environnement de startup made in France en pleine croissance.

  

* Participe à des défis techniques de pointe et contribue à l’évolution d’une plateforme innovante !

  

* Intègre une équipe collaborative où tes contributions auront un impact direct sur le produit et ses utilisateurs.

  

* Une culture d'entreprise prônant l'autonomie, la responsabilisation, la communication et la bienveillance.

  

* Des tickets restaurant \& un remboursement à hauteur de 50% de ton abonnement de transport.

  

* Un forfait mobilité durable qui te permet de financer jusqu'à 500 euros un moyen de transport écologique (vélo, trottinette électrique, gyropode, mono\-roue, hoverboard…)

  

* Une prime d'intéressement

  


  

  



**Profil recherché :**

  

* **Expérience confirmée** en développement Python (3 ans minimum), avec une bonne connaissance des standards et bonnes pratiques ( tests, refactoring…).

  

* Idéalement, tu possèdes un solide background en **Machine Learning / Deep Learning**, notamment dans le **Traitement du Langage Naturel (NLP)**.

  

* Maîtrise d’au moins un framework de Deep Learning (PyTorch, TensorFlow) et compréhension approfondie du **fonctionnement des transformers** (Hugging Face, etc.).

  

* Familiarité avec les concepts et outils de **MLOps** (Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions / GitLab CI, MLflow ou DVC).

  

* Connaissances spécifiques en **RAG (Retriever\-augmented Generation)**, **techniques d’Embedding** (ex. FAISS, Milvus) et **Agentic Orchestration** (LangChain, Llamaindex, AI SDK ou équivalents).

  

* Expérience sur des services IA managés. (**AWS Bedrock** / Gemini / Azure…)

  

Et surtout...

* Capacité à travailler en équipe sur des projets complexes, et à communiquer efficacement avec des profils pluridisciplinaires (Data Engineers, DevOps, Product Managers, etc.).

  

* **Autonomie et sens de l’initiative** : force de proposition pour résoudre des problématiques IA avancées.

**Si tu es prêt(e) à relever ce défi et à contribuer activement à notre aventure, nous attendons ta candidature avec impatience !**

results.title: Legal Operations Lead (8-Month Maternity Cover)
results.description:
**About BlaBlaCar**  

BlaBlaCar is the world’s leading community\-based travel app enabling 27 million members a year to carpool or travel by bus in 21 countries. Our team of 800 employees counts over 50 nationalities and is spread across our 5 global offices, 30% working fully remotely.  

### **Your Mission**



We are looking for a highly organized **Legal Operations Lead** to join our Paris\-based Legal team as a replacement from **late May 2026 to January 2027**. You will report to the Head of Legal and lead a team of 2, driving efficiency and scaling our legal infrastructure.



Your role is to optimize the "how" of the Legal department. You will be a bridge between legal expertise and operational excellence, ensuring our team of \~10 people stays agile and tech\-forward.

  


### **Key Responsibilities**


* **Team Leadership:** Manage and mentor 2 team members, ensuring smooth day\-to\-day operations and professional growth.
* **Project Management:** Drive large\-scale projects forward, from process optimization to cross\-functional stakeholder management.**Tech Stack Ownership:** Act as the administrator for our **CLM tool (contract management lifecycle tool)**
* **M (Contract Lifecycle Management)** tool (Juro), **Equity Management Platform (Equify)**, and champion the integration of **AI tools** to automate routine legal tasks.
* **Process Excellence:** Refine contract drafting workflows and ensure seamless collaboration with multiple business units, automation of manual processes, and integration of company tools.
* **Stakeholder Liaison:** Work closely with internal partners, including Finance, Tech and Business teams.

  




### **Your Qualifications**


* **Experience:** At least 5 years in Legal Ops, Contract Management, or as a Senior Legal Assistant, ideally within a fast\-paced start\-up or scale\-up environment.
* **Leadership:** Proven experience in people management.
* **Tech Savvy:** Expert\-level knowledge of CLM tools and a strong interest/proficiency in AI tools for legal productivity.
* **Project Management:** Exceptional ability to manage complex projects and meet aggressive deadlines.
* **Communication:** Full working proficiency in **English and French** is mandatory.
* **Mindset:** You are detail\-oriented, creative, and a natural problem solver. You thrive working on complex issues, and you are not afraid of big volumes of work.
  


### **What we have to offer**


* Hybrid status for this role (2\- 3 days per week at the office)
* 4 additional weeks on top of legal maternity/paternity leaves
* 50% healthcare coverage (Alan)
* Minimum 25 days holiday per year
* Local meal plan policy (Swile card)
* 50% transportation paid (Forfait Mobilité Durable)
* Free unlimited carpooling \& bus rides
* Regular team building events
* 1 day off per year to test our product

  

  

### **Interested in joining the ride?**



Here’s what your hiring journey will look like.


* a 45\-min video\-call with one of our Talent Acquisition Managers to get to know you, understand your career expectations and answer your questions
* a 60\-min video\-call with our Legal Operations Lead to understand your background and clarify the position and expectations
* a 45\-min video\-call with our Head of Legal who will be your direct manager for this position
* a 30\-min min video\-call with our General Counsel for values fit and closing off the process

Usually, our hiring process lasts on average 20\-25 days and offers usually come within 48 hours.



*BlaBlaCar is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.*
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
results.company_description: BlaBlaCar is the world’s leading community-based travel app enabling 29 million members a year to carpool or travel by bus in 21 countries.

results.title: CDI - Strategic Portfolio & Communication Manager (H/F)
results.description:
About the job

Danone France is not trying to be the best company in the world, but the best company for the world! That's why all 26 of our brands in France are B Corp™ certified. B Corp is the compass that guides our CSR strategy! This certification allows us to challenge ourselves, continually improve and measure our social and environmental performance.

  



Danone's research and innovation (R\&I) centre, located in Gif\-sur\-Yvette on the Saclay plateau, is a global center of excellence dedicated to food innovation research. Inaugurated in 2023, this ultra\-modern center is at the heart of one of the world's leading scientific hubs. It is home to more than 500 passionate experts of 40 different nationalities, working in the fields of life sciences, health and nutrition, consumer experience and the development of tomorrow's products. Equipped with laboratories and pilot facilities, it supports innovation and development.

  



The Danone R\&I Center is part of a global research ecosystem built to accelerate innovation in food and health. At its core, our DDAI program (Data, Digital \& AI) is transforming Research \& Innovation across 6 strategic flagships — from Gut Health \& Microbiome to Consumer Insights and In Silico Modeling — driving a portfolio of 20 high\-impact priority projects.



Join us to shape the future of food and wellness as our new **Strategic Portfolio \& Communication Manager**, a permanent position based in Gif\-sur\-Yvette with an immediate start.

  


**Position Overview**



Reporting to the Senior Director of the DDAI Strategic Office, the Strategic Portfolio \& Communication Manager plays a crucial role in driving the DDAI strategy forward and will:


* Oversee the DDAI use case portfolio, ensuring strategic alignment and resource optimization to focus on the most valuable initiatives.
* Maintain the portfolio management framework, tracking execution and performance while facilitating data\-driven decision\-making for prioritization.
* Develop DDAI\-specific acculturation and training modules for R\&I and QFS, complementing existing group programs.
* Drive internal and external communication, including community events such as DDAI Days and webinars.


**Key Responsibilities**


* Manage the DDAI portfolio by tracking use case execution, performance and impact, and preparing key insights for the monthly steering committee.
* Develop and execute a communication strategy to animate the DDAI community within R\&I, fostering a strong data culture.
* Create compelling presentations and reports for senior executives to keep them informed of the DDAI program's progress.
* Organize and lead community events such as DDAI Days and webinars to share successes, best practices and build momentum.


**Our employer commitments:**


* The guarantee of a relevant, competitive and scalable compensation package, through external benchmark and internal equity. It consists among other things of a fixed salary, an yearly bonus, gain sharing.
* Flexibility of work and workplaces, such as weekly homeworking.
* Skills development for all, thanks to our Danone Academy France and through a year\-round managerial conversation cycle.
* The possibility to use up to 3 days a year of volunteering through the platform Vendredi.
* Parenting policy benefits, such as extended Parental Leave (14 additional maternity/paternity days covered), or the ability to convert some earnings into time off
* Other benefits include a complementary pension scheme, health care plan, CSE, 100% of the Navigo pass covered


About you

The criteria below remain indicative. A candidate who has a different combination of experience and skills could also be considered.


* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Business, Strategy, Communication, or a related field.
* 10\+ years of experience in portfolio management, strategic planning, or corporate communications, preferably within a technology or R\&D environment.
* Proven experience in portfolio management, with a strong ability to track project execution and facilitate prioritization decisions.
* Excellent communication skills, with demonstrated experience in preparing executive\-level communications and managing community engagement initiatives.
* Strong strategic thinking skills with an ability to ensure projects align with broader business objectives and deliver maximum value.
* Superior stakeholder management skills and the ability to facilitate decision\-making among diverse groups.
* Familiarity with Data, Digital, and AI concepts and their application in an R\&I environment is a strong plus.
* Fluent in English


We are proud to promote diversity and equal opportunities within our teams. We believe that our differences make us stronger, and that an inclusive work environment supports our growth as a company, as teams, and as individuals. We therefore welcome all applications\* while fostering an inclusive culture where everyone can feel they belong.



We have also chosen to remove inclusive writing from our job descriptions, as its complexity can create barriers for individuals with cognitive disabilities, including dyslexia, dysphasia or apraxia.

  


* *All applications will be considered regardless of origin, background, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, or any other characteristic.*


About us

One Planet, One Health \- BY YOU !



Our four core values "HOPE": HUMANISM, OPENNESS, CLOSENESS and ENTHUSIASM serve as our compass.



Every day, you will make decisions that impact our economic and societal performance, as well as our ability to achieve our ambitions.



At Danone, you can just be yourself. We are convinced that it is up to YOU to define how you work, develop and progress.



With us, you will work in a challenging, authentic, and caring environment.



Want to know more about the daily life of our danoners? Check out our LinkedIn page and our @DanoneTalentFrance Instagram account.



You want to take action to bring health through food to as many people as possible? Join us!



\#LI\-FR
results.company_description: “One planet. One Health by YOU” - these words reflect our vision that the health of people and the health of the planet are interconnected. Join our movement for a healthier world!

results.title: Group Manager Category Plastics (Flexible & Rigid) (F/M/X)
results.description:
The Bel Group is a major player in the food industry through portions of dairy, fruit and plant\-based products, and one of the world leaders in branded cheeses. Its portfolio of differentiated and internationally recognized brands includes The Laughing Cow®, Kiri®, Babybel®, Boursin® Nurishh®, Pom'Potes® and GoGo squeeZ®, as well as some 30 local brands. Together, these brands helped the Group generate sales of €3\.74 billion in 2024\.



Do you want to join a company with strong brands that puts consumers and responsibility at the heart of the decision\-making process? Then Bel is made for you!



Are you bold, pragmatic, and determined? Do you want to contribute to the transformation of an international agri\-food company? Them come join us and measure the impact of your talent and energy in realizing an ambitious and sustainable company project!

  

**\#IWorkForAllForGood**

 **Your Mission**  



As **Group Manager Category Plastics (Flexible \& Rigid)**, you will define and execute the global sourcing strategy for plastic packaging materials used across Bel’s food product portfolio, with a **strong focus on sustainability transformation**.

You will act as a **key driver of Bel’s sustainable packaging roadmap**, ensuring that environmental ambitions are translated into concrete sourcing decisions, supplier engagement, and industrially viable solutions, while guaranteeing **food safety, security of supply, cost competitiveness, and regulatory compliance**.

You will also be responsible for **Plastic Caps (Materne)** global category **direct management**.  


**Key Responsibilities**  


**Sustainable Global Category Strategy**  


* Define, deploy, and continuously improve the global category strategy for plastic packaging (flexible films, rigid plastics, containers, lids), fully aligned with Bel’s sustainability objectives.
* Integrate **eco‑design, recyclability, recycled content, material reduction, and circular economy principles** into category strategies and sourcing decisions.
* Monitor market trends, raw material price evolution, regulatory developments (food contact, recyclability, EPR, plastics regulation), and supplier capabilities to anticipate risks and opportunities.
* Lead global sourcing initiatives, RFQs, and contract negotiations, balancing **environmental impact, cost performance, industrial feasibility, and supply reliability**.
* Drive standardization and leverage global synergies to accelerate sustainable solutions while respecting local business constraints.

  


**Supplier Partnership \& Responsible Sourcing**  


* Build long‑term, value‑driven partnerships with strategic suppliers committed to sustainability, innovation, and responsible practices.
* Actively engage suppliers on **sustainability roadmaps**, including recycled and bio‑based materials, carbon footprint reduction, transparency, and continuous improvement.
* Manage and optimize the supplier panel through performance management, risk assessment, compliance, and development plans.
* Ensure full alignment with Bel’s standards on **food safety, quality, ethics, and responsible sourcing**.

  


**Sustainability \& Innovation Leadership**  


* Act as a key contributor to Bel’s sustainable packaging transformation by scouting **new materials, technologies, and innovative suppliers**.
* Support cross‑functional innovation projects in close collaboration with R\&D, Sustainability, Quality, Operations, and Marketing.
* Translate sustainability ambitions into **scalable, industrialized solutions**, balancing environmental benefits with operational and financial constraints.
* Contribute to the measurement and monitoring of **environmental performance indicators** related to packaging materials.

  


**Team Leadership \& Capability Building**  


* Lead, coach, and develop two buyers, building strong expertise in **sustainable sourcing, supplier management, and category analytics**.
* Embed sustainability criteria into objectives, sourcing practices, and decision‑making processes.
* Foster a collaborative, accountable, and high‑performance team culture.

  


**Performance, Governance \& Reporting**  


* Define and monitor category KPIs covering **cost savings, service level, supplier performance, risk management, and sustainability progress**.
* Prepare and present category strategies and sustainability progress to senior management.
* Contribute to the continuous improvement of procurement processes, governance, and tools in support of Bel’s sustainability ambitions.

  


**Your Profile**  


**Education \& Experience**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Procurement, Supply Chain, Engineering, Business, or a related field.
* 10 years of experience in procurement or category management, ideally in plastics, packaging, food industry, cosmetics, pharmaceutical.
* Proven experience in strategic sourcing, supplier negotiations, and cost management within complex, international environments.
* First experience in people management and a strong motivation to develop leadership skills.

  


**Skills \& Competencies**
* Demonstrated leadership, proven experience in driving change and empowering others by setting clear vision and goals. Capable of motivating and developing team members, promoting accountability, and nurturing talent within a matrix organization.
* Strategic, analytical, and pragmatic mindset with strong negotiation capabilities.
* Solid awareness of sustainability challenges in packaging, including recyclability, circularity, and environmental impact.
* Ability to manage complexity and influence stakeholders in a matrix organization.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus.

  


**Why Join Bel?**
* A high‑impact, global role at the heart of Bel’s **sustainable packaging transformation**.
* The opportunity to shape sourcing strategies that directly contribute to environmental and societal objectives.
* A purpose‑driven, collaborative culture within a leading international food group.
* Strong professional development opportunities within a global procurement organization.

  


If you think that this job is for you, please click now on the button "Apply". The recruitment team of your site will contact you very soon.
results.company_description: With five universal brands, including The Laughing Cow® & Mini Babybel, Bel brings smiles to nearly 400 million consumers in 130 countries.

results.title: R&D (NPI) Program Manager – Turbogenerator Controls (m/f/d)
results.description:
At Arabelle Solutions, part of EDF Group, we’re proud to design services and solutions that are generating power not just for today and tomorrow but for generations to come.
  

You’ll work alongside passionate bright minds. We offer a broad range of opportunities for those eager to build tomorrow’s world.  

We believe a supportive culture is key to reach common goals. Diversity and an inclusive mindset makes us and our business stronger.


As R\&D (NPI) Program Manager for Turbogenerator Controls, you will structure and drive New Product Introduction programs in Machinery Control domains,
  

  

En tant que R\&D (NPI) Program Manager pour le Contrôle\-Commande Turboalternateur, tu structureras et piloteras des programmes de développement dans les domaines du contrôle des machines (Machinery Control),
**The Opportunity**


Nuclear market is accelerating, and Arabelle Solutions is building the **next\-generation control platform** that will power our future turbogenerator fleet.


Program Manager will contribuewith this **build\-the\-future** role.


Control platform is being desinged and built on from techno\-brics creating a unique environment where industrial excellence, safety\-minded engineering, and strong intra\-group partnerships come together.


You will join at a rare moment: the program is at a very early stage (pre\-concept). That means real possibility to influence on the foundations—how we structure requirements, validation, governance, and execution—while working alongside experienced leadership and a large cross\-functional team.

**Reporting \&** **Interfaces**

* Hierarchical reporting: Arabelle Solutions R\&D (NPI) Programs Leader
* Functional leadership (for new control system program): Program Director NCS
* Key interfaces: Product Management, Engineering Discipline Leaders, Quality, Manufacturing, Sourcing, Cyber/Network, and long\-term partners across the EDF Group ecosystem

 **Your Mission**


As R\&D (NPI) Program Manager for Turbogenerator Controls, you will structure and drive New Product Introduction programs in Machinery Control domains, including:

* Turbine protection \& control
* Generator control (Excitation / AVR)
* PLC / automation and associated electrical/electronic developments
* Human\-Machine Interfaces (HMI)
* Networks, cybersecurity expectations
* Turbogenerator controls simulation

  

You will lead day\-to\-day program execution in a complex matrix organization. You will operate under the functional guidance of a senior Program Director: you will be empowered to run deliverables, coordinate teams, and drive outcomes, with clear support, mentoring, and escalation paths. This role offers both autonomy and strong backing—ideal for a Program Manager eager to grow in a high\-impact, safety\-critical environment.

 **Key Responsibilities**

* Program definition \& alignment: Co\-define scope, deliverables, and success criteria with Product Management and Engineering; ensure shared understanding and clear priorities.
* Requirements \& planning: Translate high\-level product needs into structured requirements, milestones, deliverables, and a pragmatic execution plan from pre\-concept to concept readiness.
* Cross\-functional coordination: Orchestrate a multi\-disciplinary team (\~50 contributors on the main program, plus smaller projects up to \~10\) across engineering, manufacturing, sourcing, quality, cyber/network and partners.
* Execution control: Drive schedule and budget tracking, monitor progress, and implement risk/opportunity management with practical mitigation plans.
* Safety and compliance mindset: Ensure safety, quality, and compliance expectations are embedded early and continuously (project requirements on nuclear and functional safety).
* Governance \& reviews: Prepare and lead design reviews, milestone gates, and concise management reporting; ensure actions are followed through and decisions are documented.
* Change management: Manage evolving requirements and priorities while keeping plans, deliverables, and interfaces consistent as the program matures.
* EDF Group partnership: Build effective collaboration with EDF Group entities and long\-term partners around sovereign technology bricks, interface alignment, shared ownership, and long\-term maintainability.

 **What Success Looks Like (12–18 months)**

* A structured and credible execution framework for the new controls platform (scope, milestones, validation logic, governance rhythm).
* Early technical maturity: clear requirements, robust interfaces, and concept readiness supported by evidence.
* Predictable program delivery: risks identified early, mitigations owned, and stakeholders aligned.

 **What You Bring**

***Must\-have***

* Engineering degree (Automation, Electrical, Control Systems, or equivalent).
* Strong automation/PLC background, with a clear appetite for program/project management.
* Ability to coordinate multi\-disciplinary teams in a matrix and multi\-site environment.
* Fluent English (written, spoken, reading).

 **Nice\-to\-have**

* Project management recognized experience
* 5\+ years’ experience in power generation products/systems (nuclear conventional island and/or fossil).
* Exposure to regulated or safety\-critical industrial environments (training can be provided).

 **Why Join**

* High\-impact program: shape the future of turbogenerator controls from the very beginning.
* Sovereign EDF Group technologies: contribute to a strategic platform built on techno\-brics owned by EDF Group entities.
* Real growth with support: autonomy in execution, plus mentoring and guidance from an experienced Program Director
* A strong industrial ecosystem: work with experts across engineering, manufacturing, cyber, simulation and long\-term partners.

  

Travel: up to 25% depending on stakeholder and program needs.

 **L’opportunité**


Le marché nucléaire accélère, et Arabelle Solutions développe la plateforme de contrôle\-commande de nouvelle génération qui équipera notre future flotte de turbogénérateurs.


Program Manager contribuera a **construire le futur**.


Cette plateforme s’appuie sur des briques technologiques offrant un environnement unique où excellence industrielle, ingénierie orientée sûreté et partenariats intragroupe forts se rejoignent.


Tu rejoindras le programme à un moment rare : il est à un stade très amont (pré\-concept). Cela signifie une influence réelle sur les fondations — la structuration des exigences, la stratégie de validation, la gouvernance et l’exécution — aux côtés d’un leadership expérimenté et d’une large équipe pluridisciplinaire.

 **Rattachement \& Interfaces**

* Rattachement hiérarchique : Responsable Programmes R\&D (NPI) – Arabelle Solutions
* Pilotage fonctionnel (pour le projet New control system): Program Director NCS
* Principales interfaces : Product Management, responsables de disciplines d’ingénierie, Qualité, Manufacturing, Achats, Cyber/Réseaux, ainsi que les partenaires long terme au sein de l’écosystème Groupe EDF

**Ta mission**


En tant que R\&D (NPI) Program Manager pour le Contrôle\-Commande Turboalternateur, tu structureras et piloteras des programmes de développement dans les domaines du contrôle des machines (Machinery Control), incluant :

* Protection et contrôle turbine
* Contrôle alternateur (Excitation / AVR)
* Automates / automatismes (PLC) et développements électriques/électroniques associés
* Interfaces Homme\-Machine (IHM)
* Réseaux et exigences cybersécurité
* Simulation contrôle commande turboalternateur

  

Tu piloteras l’exécution au quotidien dans une organisation matricielle complexe. Pour le programme principal, tu travailleras sous la direction fonctionnelle d’un Program Director: tu seras responsabilisé(e) sur des livrables, la coordination des équipes et l’atteinte des résultats, avec un support clair, du mentoring et des voies d’escalade définies. Le poste offre à la fois autonomie et accompagnement — idéal pour un(e) Program Manager souhaitant évoluer dans un environnement à fort impact, critique pour la sûreté.

 **Principales responsabilités**

* Définition \& alignement du programme : co\-définir le périmètre, les livrables et les critères de succès avec le Product Management et l’Ingénierie ; assurer un alignement fort, une compréhension partagée et des priorités claires.
* Exigences \& planification : décliner les besoins produit de haut niveau en exigences structurées, jalons, livrables et plan d’exécution pragmatique, du pré\-concept jusqu’à la maturité “concept readiness”.
* Coordination transverse : orchestrer une équipe pluridisciplinaire (\~50 contributeurs sur le programme principal, et des projets plus petits jusqu’à \~10 personnes) couvrant ingénierie, manufacturing, achats, qualité, cyber/réseaux et partenaires.
* Pilotage de l’exécution : suivre planning et budget, monitorer l’avancement, et mettre en œuvre une gestion des risques/opportunités avec des plans de mitigation concrets.
* Culture sûreté \& conformité : garantir que les attentes en matière de sûreté, qualité et conformité sont intégrées dès le début et tout au long du programme (exigences projet liées à la sûreté nucléaire et à la sûreté fonctionnelle).
* Gouvernance \& revues : préparer et animer les revues de conception, jalons de passage (gates) et reporting de management synthétique ; s’assurer du suivi des actions et de la traçabilité des décisions.
* Gestion des modifications : piloter l’évolution des exigences et des priorités en maintenant la cohérence des plans, livrables et interfaces à mesure que le programme se structure.
* Partenariats Groupe EDF : construire une collaboration efficace avec les entités du Groupe EDF et les partenaires long terme autour des briques technologiques souveraines, de l’alignement des interfaces, du partage de responsabilités et de la maintenabilité à long terme.

 **À quoi ressemble la réussite (12–18 mois)**

* Un cadre d’exécution structuré et crédible pour la nouvelle plateforme de contrôle\-commande (périmètre, jalons, logique de validation, rythme de gouvernance).
* Une maturité technique amont : exigences claires, interfaces robustes, et préparation à la phase “concept” appuyée par des éléments factuels.
* Une exécution prévisible : risques identifiés tôt, mitigations prises en charge, et parties prenantes alignées.

 **Ce que tu apportes**


Indispensable (Must\-have)

* Diplôme d’ingénieur (Automatisme, Électrique, Systèmes de contrôle\-commande, ou équivalent).
* Solide background automatismes/PLC, avec un réel intérêt pour le pilotage programme/projet.
* Capacité à coordonner des équipes pluridisciplinaires dans un environnement matriciel et multi\-sites.
* Anglais courant (écrit, lu, parlé).

  

Atouts (Nice\-to\-have)

* Expérience reconnue en gestion de projet/programme.
* 5\+ ans d’expérience dans des produits/systèmes de production d’énergie (îlot conventionnel nucléaire et/ou thermique/fossile).
* Exposition à des environnements réglementés ou critiques pour la sûreté (formation possible).

 **Pourquoi nous rejoindre**

* Programme à fort impact : façonner l’avenir du contrôle\-commande turbogénérateur dès le tout début.
* Technologies souveraines Groupe EDF : contribuer à une plateforme stratégique construite sur des briques technologiques détenues par des entités du Groupe EDF.
* Progression réelle avec soutien : autonomie d’exécution, avec mentoring et guidance d’un Program Director expérimenté.
* Écosystème industriel solide : travailler avec des experts en ingénierie, manufacturing, cyber, simulation et partenaires long terme.

 **Déplacements :** jusqu’à 25% selon les besoins du programme et des parties prenantes.

  

Join us and work with global teams to support global customers ! At Arabelle Solutions, we have team members of more than 49 nationalities spread across 16 countries.


At Arabelle Solutions, we know diversity makes teams and business stronger.

results.title: UX Strategist Senior - Streaming & Médias (IT) / Freelance
results.description:
Bonjour,
  
  

Nous recherchons pour notre client grand compte un UX Strategist Senior ? Streaming \& Médias.
  
  

Nous étudions \- prioritairement \- les candidatures qui nous sont adressées à freelance à insyco . fr avec les informations suivantes :
  
  

Argumentaire écrit répondant de façon ciblée au besoin ci\-dessous
  
  

CV à jour au format Word
  
  

Date de prochaine disponibilité
  
  

Tarif journalier
  
  

Merci d'indiquer la référence MDE/UXS/5170 dans l'objet de votre message.
  
  

Contexte et définition du besoin
  
  

Nous recherchons une prestation UX Stratégie Senior pour le compte de la direction du Design, en étroite collaboration avec les équipes techniques et produit des offres d'information du client.
  
  

**En transverse :**  

Synchronisation et alignement avec les Leads Design Transverses (identité de marque, Design System, accessibilité, Obs?) sur la stratégie et l'expérience globale
  
  

Synchronisation et alignement avec les leads design sur la stratégie mise en place pour garantir une cohérence avec l'ensemble des offres
  
  

**Sur les produits :**  

Collaboration étroite avec les Products Manager de l'offre afin d'appréhender parfaitement les enjeux et objectifs.
  
  

Définition de la stratégie de Discovery à lancer et à affiner tout au long de la roadmap, en étroite collaboration avec les PM et les UX déjà au sein du produit
  
  

Définition de la méthode de Research sur les besoins des utilisateurs (interviews, observations, tests, data analytics) et identification de leurs comportements et leurs attentes,
  
  

Assurer le suivi de production et le maintien du repository de tous les enseignements utilisateurs selon la méthode de l'Atomic Research
  
  

Accompagnement des équipes Produit et transverses sur les méthodes UX afin de s'assurer que l'utilisateur reste tout au long des décisions au centre des préoccupations
  
  

Adaptation de la méthodologie en fonction de l'ambition du sujet et des deadlines
  
  

Préparation et animation des ateliers de co\-création (idéation, design reviews,...) avec les différentes parties\-prenantes,
  
  

Création et mise à jour des livrables UX pour chaque projet (Persona, parcours utilisateurs, Jobs to be done, user journey / Expérience map / Service blueprint)
  
  

Travail en méthodologie agile avec les équipes produit et participation aux rituels
  
  

Animation d'atelier de définition de vision et stratégie produit
  
  

Définition d'une stratégie UX
  
  

**Au sein de l'équipe design :**  

Participation aux instances de réflexion et d'amélioration ainsi qu'alimenter le repository des enseignements utilisateurs
  
  

Participation aux rituels de l'équipe design (Guilde Design, points de synchronisation)
  
  

**Livrables attendus :**  

Veille \& Benchmarks
  
  

Recherche utilisateur, études et personas
  
  

Parcours clients, sketching, wireframes, Expérience map, Jobs to be done
  
  

Définition d'une stratégie UX
  
  

**Profil candidat:****Expertises obligatoires :**  

Expérience significative dans le secteur des médias (plateforme de streaming vidéo) à très large audience (plus de 30 millions visiteurs unique par mois)
  
  

Culture multi\-screen et maîtrise des environnements et contraintes responsive ainsi qu'une bonne connaissance du fonctionnement et des contraintes sur les interfaces TV
  
  

Très bonne capacité à générer des livrables visuels permettant de vulgariser et de simplifier des situations ou concepts complexes en une présentation claire, concise et impactante (type storyboard)
  
  

Expérience avec une équipe éditoriale
  
  

**Expertises requises :**  

Excellente maitrise des outils et méthodes de conception centrée utilisateurs et de recueil des besoins utilisateurs.
  
  

Aisance à animer / faciliter des ateliers
  
  

Excellente maitrise des outils de conception et le prototypage d'interfaces web et mobiles : Figma
  
  

A déjà travaillé dans un environnement Agile (scrum)
  
  

Design thinking et du Lean UX
  
  

**Expertises souhaitables :**  

Connaissance de la méthodologie d'atomic Research serait un plus
  
  

Connaissance de la réglementation en matière d'accessibilité serait un plus

results.title: Accelerator - Product Owner Platform Engineering (Paris)
results.description:
*Le contenu du poste est libellé en anglais car il nécessite de nombreuses interactions avec nos filiales à l’international, l'anglais étant la langue de travail.*

*This job offer is accessible to all, regardless of gender.*

**Job Title:** *Accelerator \- Product Owner Platform Engineering*

* *Location: Paris*
* *Hybrid Work \- 60% office based, 40% remote*
* *Job type: Permanent, Full time*

***Our Team***
==============


In a nutshell, a Platform team is a team that creates the foundational layers and core building blocks of a company's products.


Our customers are the Sanofi Software engineering teams. As such, we reduce their **Cognitive Load** and help them Improve Development Speed by providing them with Plug n Play Solutions that enable them to efficiently and securely build business features.

  

More concretely a platform can be at different levels of granularity:

* CI configs and rules to be used by other teams
* IaC, tooling to deploy and monitor resources in the Cloud
* Development environment, tools and shared libraries
* Help and can define global system architecture/security
* Core abstractions (data model, business modeling) API/SDKs

***About the job***
===================


This role goes beyond delivery management. You will **shape strategy**, **drive discovery**, and ensure our platform creates **measurable impact** for users, engineering teams, and the business.


As a Product Owner for the Platform team, you will lead the initiatives that **reduce friction** in the SDLC of the Engineering teams in Sanofi.

**About Sanofi:**


We’re an R\&D\-driven, AI\-powered biopharma company committed to improving people’s lives and delivering compelling growth. Our deep understanding of the immune system – and innovative pipeline – enables us to invent medicines and vaccines that treat and protect millions of people around the world. Together, we chase the miracles of science to improve people’s lives.

 **Own the Problem, Not Just the Backlog:**

* Define and frame product problems with stakeholders, users and developers
* Frame opportunities using qualitative and quantitative insights — not assumptions or stakeholder pressure
* Communicate in terms of problems to solve and outcomes to achieve, rather than predefined solutions to implement
* Build and prioritise a Platform roadmap grounded in measurable outcomes, customer impact and strategic value, not urgency or opinion

 **Measure and Learn:**

* Define clear, measurable outcomes tied to user behaviour, product value, and platform adoption
* Establish and monitor North Star metrics and leading indicators to guide decision\-making and iteration
* Use data to continuously evaluate product\-market fit and user experience
* Foster a culture of experimentation, evidence\-based decisions, and continuous learning

 **Engage \& Align Stakeholders:**

* Co\-create and continuously refine product strategy in partnership with senior stakeholders and leadership
* Use storytelling to align and rally people around problems and outcomes
* Champion Developer Experience as a strategic priority
* Drive adoption through strong stakeholder engagement and internal advocacy
* Define adoption KPIs (usage, NPS, reduction in shadow IT, cycle time improvements, etc.)
* Quantify customer (developer) satisfaction
* Act as the strategic bridge between platform engineering team and platform users (developers, squads, pods)

 **Build Shared Understanding:**

* Lead collaborative discovery practices to build shared mental models (ex: story mapping, example mapping, 3 Amigos, design sessions)
* Design and run experiments to validate hypotheses before committing engineering investment
* Align teams and stakeholders around the "why" before jumping to "how"
* Embed measurement as a key functionality in every feature
* Ensure work is structured around measurable value creation rather than feature output or ticket volume

***About you***
===============

**Experience:**

* Proven experience as a **Senior Product Owner / Product Manager** in complex, regulated environments
* Strong discovery mindset and evidence\-based decision\-making
* Ability to influence diverse stakeholders, including executive audiences and align cross\-functional teams
* Experience working with **Platform products** and **developer\-facing services** (DevOps, CI/CD, cloud, infrastructure enablement, APIs, microservices, Infrastructure as Code, developer tooling)
* Proven track record driving **platform adoption at scale**
* Strategic thinker who stays **hands\-on** with teams
* Skilled at balancing between delivery and discovery, between short\-term needs and long\-term vision
* Nice to have: experience in life sciences, healthcare, or biotech

**Languages:**

* Fluent in **English** as we are an international team!

**Education:**

* Nice to have: Advanced Product Owner certifications: **PSPO\-II, PSPBM, PAL\-EBM** or equivalent

 **What makes this role unique?**


This Product Owner role is perfect for software engineers who want to transition into product management while leveraging their technical expertise. You'll still be deeply involved in technical discussions, but your focus shifts from writing code to enabling others to write better code, faster.

***Why choose us?***
====================


We provide a highly open and collaborative environment, with an opportunity to work with a world class team. You will be able to:

* Learn what it takes to make a service with a truly global reach
* Be part of an organization that values diversity, inclusion, and the richness of different backgrounds and experiences
* Engage in meaningful work that combines the challenges of pharma, manufacturing, environmental matters and technical fields, offering abundant opportunities for professional growth and impact
* Contribute to a company that is not only a leader in healthcare but also a pioneer in digital transformation, shaping the future of global health

**Pursue** ***Progress*****. Discover** ***Extraordinary***
===========================================================


Join Sanofi and step into a new era of science \- where your growth can be just as transformative as the work we do. We invest in you to reach further, think faster, and do what’s never\-been\-done\-before. You’ll help push boundaries, challenge convention, and build smarter solutions that reach the communities we serve. Ready to chase the miracles of science and improve people’s lives? Let’s Pursue *Progress* and Discover *Extraordinary* – together.


At Sanofi, we provide equal opportunities to all regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law

**\#LI\-FRA**

**\#LI\-Hybrid**


null

results.title: Core Insurance Platform Production Manager
results.description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


In the past few years, EA has launched a transformation program aiming to standardize insurance processes and implement a Core Insurance Platform to support them, which will progressively be used by all EA entities.


This platform is now live, and the production activities are becoming more and more critical in EA’s IT landscape.


The **Core Insurance Platform Production Manager** oversees all IT production activities around the Core Insurance Platform. His/her role is critical to ensuring the smooth operation of applications and systems, optimizing development and deployment processes, providing the right level of communication to all stakeholders.


He/she will work in close contact with the rest of the IT insurance team, mainly IT POs managing the product roadmap of the different domains composing the insurance platform.


Here are the key responsibilities and required skills for this position:

**1/ Production Coordination**:

* Establish and maintain IT production processes (such as Incident Management, Change Management, Problem Management) in alignment with EA’s guidelines.
* Ensure availability and performance of applications.
* Design and implement the right governance, aligned with the global governance already in place
* Manage and coordinate all external Partners in charge of maintaining the components of the Core Insurance Platform:
* Insurance platform: Duck Creek System integrator and Software editor (main partners)
* Document generator: Quadient System integrator and Software editor
* Middleware (Azure APIM and ADF) maintenance team
* Duck Creek Software editor
* Quadient Software editor
* Identify opportunities for process optimization.
* Propose solutions to enhance production efficiency and reliability.

**2/ Release Management**:

* Implement a robust Release Management process embedding all dependencies between systems and between initiatives (business as usual vs ongoing projects)
* Supervise deployment, maintenance, and system monitoring activities.
* Gain a global understanding of all the solutions involved.
* Coordinate a constant dialogue with IT POs, responsible for the consistency of the architecture of single modules (Policy, Billing, Claims).
* Supervise backlog management and ensure the right prioritization of tasks, aligned with EA’s global priorities
* Ensure communication and reporting for all the stakeholders.

**3/ Contract and budget Management**

* Oversee all contractual and financial engagements.
* Manage budget, provide visibility on consumption and forecasts, and ensure the respect of yearly budget commitments.
* Lead all contractual or budget adaptations needed

**4/ Security and Compliance**

* Ensure data security and compliance
* Ensure that IT operations comply with standards of quality and security

**Preferred Experience**
------------------------

* At least 10 year in delivering large IT platforms, as Project Manager and/or Production support manager
* One significant experience in delivering/managing SaaS software, ideally in insurance
* One significant experience working in English as main spoken project language

**Services Management**

* Experienced in Production support management for ERPs, ideally on an international scale and involving an offshore service provider
* Knowledge in standard production support processes (ITIL)
* Experienced in IT process assessment and optimization

**Technical**

* Experienced in ERP delivery and production support in international companies – (10 years)
* Good understanding of the implementation of SaaS software (knowledge of Duck Creek or any SaaS insurance platform is a plus
* Understanding the insurance business, travel in particular, is a plus

**Team Management \& Leadership**

* Organized, self\-sufficient with ability to evolve in matrix organization and drive change – (5 years)
* Strong capacity to enforce standard processes, but still being open to adaptation and managing the transition in a quickly evolving environment

**Communication**

* Excellent communicator and speaker in English, both online in written interactions, and face\-to\-face interaction, both with entity leads, technical stakeholders, businesses and Service Providers
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills
* English \& ideally French speaking

**Recruitment Process**
-----------------------


1/ HR


2/ N\+1


3/ Optional : technical test, N\+2, culture fit

**Additional Information**
--------------------------

* Contract Type: **Full\-Time**
* Location: **Saint\-Denis**
* Education Level: **Master's Degree**
* Experience: **\> 10 years**
* **50% remote**


The Europ Assistance group is committed to inclusion and non\-discrimination. We take action on a daily basis in favor of the disabled, seniors, social diversity and equality between men and women. Above all, we recruit skills and personalities. Diversity within our teams is a major challenge, as it is a source of innovation and performance.

**About**
---------


With over million customers around the world and 12,000 employees in 37 countries, Europ Assistance is the 2nd global player of assistance services in 3 areas: travel, mobility, and personal care. Founded in 1963, Europ Assistance, the inventor of assistance, supports customers in over 200 countries and territories thanks to our network of 750\.000 approved providers.


Our mission is to bring people from distress to relief – anytime, anywhere. We provide automobile assistance, travel assistance and insurance services, as well as personal assistance services such as the protection of the elderly, the protection of digital identity, telemedicine and the Conciergerie. The company vision, shared by our 12,000 employees, is to prove every day that we are the most reliable care company in the world, and to make our people proud of who we are, what we do, and, how we do it.


Europ Assistance is part of the Generali Group, one of the world’s leading insurers. It is with the support and commitment of Generali, its shareholder, that the Europ Assistance Group has become the world leader in its sector. As long\-standing partners, the two entities are jointly committed to future\-oriented projects.


Our promise and tagline, "You Live, We Care" is what we stand for every day. We are a care business, delivered by people. "We care" means that we are caring, available, reliable and easy to work with. Our employees bring those values to life.


As a leader in the assistance industry, we are looking for a passionate, committed, and self\-driven talent to help us shape the future of the industry.


Europ Assistance is committed to inclusion and non\-discrimination. We act in favor of disability, social diversity and equality. Above all, we recruit skills and personalities, and diversity within our teams is key because it is a source of innovation and performance.

**Make an impact, join Europ Assistance!**

results.title: Senior Investment Officer – Digital
results.description:
**Senior Investment Officer – Digital**


**Job \#:** req36160
  

**Organization:** IFC
  

**Sector:** Investment
  

**Grade:** GG
  

**Term Duration:** 3 years 0 months  


**Recruitment Type:** International Recruitment
  

**Location:** Washington, DC,United States; Paris,France
  

**Required Language(s):** English
  

**Preferred Language(s):** Spanish, French
  

**Closing Date:** 4/16/2026 (MM/DD/YYYY) at 11:59pm UTC
  

**Description**


Build a career with impact. Working at the World Bank Group (WBG) provides a unique opportunity to help countries solve their greatest development challenges. As one of the largest sources of funding and knowledge for developing countries, the WBG is a unique partnership of five global institutions dedicated to ending poverty, increasing shared prosperity, and promoting sustainable development. With 189 member countries and more than 120 offices worldwide, the WBG works with public and private sector partners, investing in groundbreaking projects and using data, research, and technology to develop solutions to the most urgent global challenges.


The WBG’s Digital and AI Vice Presidency, which houses the Digital \& AI industry expertise across the WBG, works to connect operational teams across the WBG and clients with effective public‑ and private‑sector solutions to address barriers to expanded internet access and usage in emerging markets. Its mandate is to deliver knowledge and solutions that enable the WBG to advance its mission. Within this structure, the Digital Access Solutions \& Impact Department (WKDAX) focuses on building the foundations of digital economies by advancing quality, affordable, and safe digital infrastructure access and data \& AI solutions, with the aim of delivering scalable development impact and creating more and better jobs.


The WKDAX group is looking for a Washington, DC or Paris\-based Senior Investment Officer with extensive sector and investment expertise that can help deepen the scope, reach and impact of WBG’s interventions in the sector. The position will report to the WKDAX Manager and work with external clients and partners and WBG teams across regions and disciplines.

**Duties \& Accountabilities:**


The responsibilities of the Senior Investment Officer will include but are not limited to:  

* Assess industry trends on a given sector vertical (e.g., digital infrastructure asset class), drawing lessons from past engagements to drive new business, improve portfolio performance, and promote knowledge sharing across WBG teams.
* Provide sector guidance to project teams on due diligence (financial, market, valuation, etc.) and risk/mitigation analysis, financial and policy regulation structuring to crowd in private sector investment for WBG engagements with private and public sector clients.
* Design and implement innovative, replicable, and scalable investment, guarantee, and other solutions, deploying the WBG product suite to address barriers to expanded internet access and usage in emerging markets, in collaboration and coordination with other WBG teams and external partners.
* Identify new approaches ranging from partners, business models and financing structures, that can accelerate private sector participation and development impact. Support and at times lead, the operational implementation of those approaches.
* Participate in and lead industry events to strengthen the WBG’s sectoral network and convene stakeholders around critical issues.
* Mentor and develop junior staff.
* Coordinate closely with technical experts (engineers, environmental specialists, lawyers, etc.) to add value to our clients' businesses, find pragmatic solutions, and achieve sustainable development impact.
* Lead WBG’s work in sub\-sectors and/or cross\-cutting initiatives, including being the primary contact point with regional and functional departments.
* Collaborate in developing strategies for the digital infrastructure sectors, countries, and cross\-cutting initiatives.
* Maintain relationships with clients and other stakeholders (government, development partners) to develop markets and investment opportunities.
* Support the WBG’s initiatives targeting increased internet access in under\-served regions across emerging markets.
**Selection Criteria**

* Genuine and strong interest in and commitment to international development and the digital infrastructure sector.
* MBA or equivalent qualification.
* At least 10 years of investment experience (e.g. commercial or investment banking, private equity or funds). Diverse product experience a plus (e.g., project financing, corporate financing, private credit, early and or growth\-stage equity investments).
* Proved track\-record for business origination and structuring of projects or transactions, and aptitude with clients.
* Sound business judgment and creativity in developing scalable and replicable solutions to increase access to connectivity in emerging markets.
* Prior investment experience in the digital infrastructure sector, particularly in emerging markets.
* Established network with telecom operators, investors, and other industry players.
* Analytical and structured, with a solid understanding of sector trends and key issues, and experience working in different sub\-sectors (e.g., broadband, data centers, towers).
* Excellent communication skills in English, both in written and oral; ability to convey ideas and positions clearly; strong presentation skills.
* Effective teamwork in multi\-cultural and multi\-location environments and ability/experience with providing guidance, supervision, professional development, and quality control of work products and analyses of more junior team members.
* Strong communication and coordination skills, with a track record of working across organizational boundaries.
* Ability to interact directly and independently with senior management of (potential) clients, partners, and senior government officials.
* Capacity to identify and successfully develop market creation opportunities in multiple countries by demonstrating long\-term perspective, open\-mindedness, persistence, innovation, and ability to leverage all instruments and programs available at the WBG.
* International exposure, especially to the emerging markets, cultural sensitivity and willingness to travel extensively.

 **WBG Culture Attributes:**


1\. Sense of urgency: Anticipate and quickly respond to the needs of internal and external stakeholders.  

2\. Thoughtful risk\-taking: Challenge the status quo and push boundaries to achieve greater impact.
  

3\. Empowerment and accountability: Empower yourself and others to act and hold each other accountable for results.


World Bank Group Core Competencies

*The World Bank Group offers comprehensive benefits, including a retirement plan; medical, life and disability insurance; and paid leave, including parental leave, as well as reasonable accommodations for individuals with disabilities.*

*We are proud to be an equal opportunity and inclusive employer with a dedicated and committed workforce, and do not discriminate based on gender, gender identity, religion, race, ethnicity, sexual orientation, or disability.*

*Learn more about working at the* *World Bank* *and* *IFC* *including our values and inspiring stories.*
results.company_description: A World Free of Poverty on a Livable Planet

results.title: Partner Manager - French speaking
results.description:
**About the Role \& Team**


Formalize is building the leading European platform for Governance, Risk \& Compliance (GRC). As part of our next growth phase, we are strengthening our partner\-led go\-to\-market strategy in the France BeNeLux region. We are looking for a **Partner Manager** to build, structure, and scale an enterprise\-grade advisory and audit partner ecosystem. This role is critical to our success in the France and BeNeLux region and will focus on partnerships with audit firms, advisory consultancies, legal and compliance specialists, and selected boutique partners. You will work closely with partner\- and director\-level stakeholders on the partner side, and with Sales, Product, and Leadership internally, to drive pipeline, credibility, and long\-term strategic alignment in a highly regulated market. This is not a transactional channel role \- it is a strategic and revenue\-relevant partnerships position.

**What you will do**

**Strategic Partner Development**

* Build and own Formalize’s strategic partner ecosystem in the France BeNeLux region
* Establish and maintain executive\-level relationships with partner, director, and practice lead stakeholders
* Position Formalize as a credible, audit\-grade GRC infrastructure platform within partner offerings

**Go\-to\-Market \& Revenue Impact**

* Design and execute structured partner motions across new partner acquisition, onboarding, enablement and success
* Own and contribute to partner\-sourced and partner\-influenced pipeline targets in close alignment with Sales leadership
* Support complex enterprise deals by coordinating partners, internal stakeholders, and commercial frameworks

**Enablement \& Market Feedback**

* Enable partners with clear, structured messaging around:NIS2, DORA, ISO 27001, GDPR and others
* Deliver partner education and enablement with a focus on practical use cases and audit relevance
* Act as the internal voice of the partner ecosystem

**Governance \& Execution**

* Negotiate and manage partnership relationships with clear expectations, governance, success metrics and running structured MBRs
* Ensure alignment, follow\-through, and accountability across long\-term partnerships
* Work independently while collaborating closely across Sales, Marketing, Product, and Leadership

**What you bring**

* 3\+ years of experience in strategic partnerships, alliances, or enterprise business development
* Previous experience from direct sales roles is seen as a plus (e.g. past experience as an Account Executive)
* It’s a plus if you have experience within B2B SaaS Advisory, audit, compliance, cybersecurity, or regulated industries
* Proven experience working with enterprise advisory or audit partners (Big\-4 or equivalent strongly preferred)
* Strong understanding of compliance, risk, audit, and regulatory buying centers
* Commercial mindset with experience owning or materially influencing revenue outcomes
* Native\-level French and professional fluency in English

**What do we offer you?**

* A key strategic and hands\-on role in a fast\-growing European SaaS company
* Direct impact on how Formalize scales in one of Europe’s most important GRC markets
* High levels of autonomy, trust, and ownership
* Close collaboration with senior leadership and international teams
* Competitive compensation and benefits
* A professional, ambitious, and collaborative culture

**Our recruitment process**

* Send your application and upload relevant information
* 30 minutes online interview with our Talent Acquisition team
* 45\-60 minutes online interview with our Head of Partner Enablement
* Completion of Personality Assessment \& Case Presentation
* 60 minutes in\-person final interview with our Country Manager France BeNeLux and CCO

**Compensation**


This role offers €90,000 OTE (On\-Target Earnings) with an 80/20 split between base salary and commission, along with uncapped commission potential.

**About Formalize**


Formalize is a tech company founded in 2021 with offices in Aarhus, Copenhagen, Milan, and Madrid. Currently, we are a team of \+170 people from 19 nationalities operating in multiple European markets and are one of the fastest growing SaaS scale\-ups. We thrive on ambition, deliver impact through pragmatism, and embrace passion and honesty. We are celebrating our wins, learn from our mistakes, and grow together as a team.


Our journey began within the whistleblowing compliance sector, highlighted by the award\-winning Whistleblower Software by Formalize, laying the foundation of our success story. Now, we have extended our expertise to a larger compliance universe, including data compliance, risk, and privacy. Our Formalize product helps companies to effortlessly navigate and stay ahead in the ever\-changing landscape of compliance. Our platform adapts to regulatory changes, continuously adapting to meet and foresee the evolving needs of our users, ensuring businesses remain compliant and confident in their operations.


Still curious? Read more about us here: About Formalize.

**Ready to apply?**


We will hold interviews and hire on an ongoing basis. For more information or questions, please contact the responsible recruiter in the Talent Acquisition team. Apply now with your resume and other relevant information through our Career Page. We look forward to seeing your application!

results.title: Account Growth Manager France
results.description:
SaleCycle is redefining how brands convert, engage, and retain customers through AI\-driven experiences across the entire customer journey.


Following our acquisition of BEYABLE in 2026, we now combine **real\-time onsite personalisation and intent scoring** with **offsite activation across email, SMS, and paid channels** enabling brands to identify, engage, convert, and re\-engage customers with precision.

**What we do**


We provide a **full\-funnel Agentic Marketing Platform**, combining:

* Real\-time behavioural analytics and intent scoring
* Onsite personalisation, A/B testing, and product recommendations
* Cross\-channel activation (email, SMS, paid media)
* CRM/CDP integrations and first\-party data orchestration
* Retail media and monetisation capabilities

**Who we are**


We are a global team of 100\+ people across the UK, France, Spain, Italy, and Eastern Europe.


We are profitable, growing, and operating with a clear mindset:

* We build, not maintain
* We prioritise outcomes over activity
* We operate with low ego and high accountability
* We challenge ourselves to step outside our comfort zone

**About the role**


The Account Growth Manager will be driving revenue expansion across our client portfolio.


Beyond managing and growing an existing base of clients, you will play a key role in **expanding our footprint within client organizations**, extending our collaboration across additional departments, regions, and brands within the same group.


You’ll work closely with our Customer Success Managers, Product, Partner \& Marketing teams to identify and develop growth opportunities, lead strategic initiatives, and ensure our clients continuously see value from our solutions.


This is a high\-impact role for someone who enjoys combining strategic thinking with hands\-on execution, **blending account development with a strong expansion mindset**, building senior stakeholder relationships, and collaborating cross\-functionally to drive sustainable growth.

**What you will do**

* Own and drive revenue growth across your portfolio of existing clients, consistently meeting or exceeding targets.
* Expand our footprint within client organizations by unlocking opportunities across new teams, regions, and brands within the same group.
* Spot and convert upsell and cross\-sell opportunities by developing a sharp understanding of client needs, priorities, and structures.
* Navigate and map complex organizations to engage the right stakeholders and accelerate growth within accounts.
* Build strong, senior\-level relationships and position yourself as a trusted partner driving measurable business impact.
* Turn insights into action by sharing industry trends, product updates, and best practices that fuel client performance.
* Work hand\-in\-hand with Customer Success to maximize retention while accelerating account growth.
* Collaborate with Product and Partners to bring client feedback to life, test new ideas, and deliver high\-impact solutions.
* Lead growth initiatives, pilots, and go\-to\-market actions that move the needle.
* Bring clarity to complexity: structure your accounts, prioritize high\-impact opportunities, and execute with focus.
* Continuously test, learn, and iterate to maximize both client value and revenue performance.

**You are great match if :**

* You have excellent spoken, written and reading skills in French and English and any additional languages you speak would be a plus
* You have \+2/3 years of experience in account management, business development, or client strategy, in a SaaS, tech, or digital marketing environment.
* You have a proven experience of selling to major brands within Retail, Travel, Fashion, (preferred)
* You have strong strategic mindset with the ability to analyze, plan, and execute growth initiatives
* You Demonstrated ability to manage complex client relationships and meet revenue targets Organisational skills to balance and prioritise numerous
* You are comfortable adapting to change, and taking ownership in a fast\-paced environment
* You have an entrepreneurial spirit: curious, solution\-oriented, and eager to contribute to building new processes


**Our Perks \& Benefits**


We value our employees at SaleCycle, so we offer great benefits, perks and incentives in addition to a competitive salary.


️ Flexible hybrid working


The Swile card to help cover your lunch expenses.


Full coverage of the Alan health insurance plan.


A day off on your birthday.


Additional leave based on seniority.


Regular events and after\-work gatherings.


️ Two remote work days per week.


Up to 28 days of remote work from abroad per year.


A monthly "well\-being and engagement" budget for each employee.


For all our perks, please visit our website


https://careers.salecycle.com/


**Our Idioms**


At SaleCycle, we care about our people, we prioritize well\-being and work\-life balance, growth \& innovation, continuously pushing boundaries as a team and a company for our costumers.


We **MOVE** together as One


We **MOVE** out of the Comfort zone


We **MOVE** at Pace


We **MOVE** to Scale


We **MOVE** to the Needle


**Hiring Process**

* An interview with our Talent Acquisition to get to know you, understand your career expectations and answer your questions (30 minutes)
* An interview with your future Manager (1h)
* A Business Case to test your sales skills (1h)
* A Final round with our CRO


️ **Support \& Equal Opportunities**


It’s okay if you don’t tick all the boxes — don’t let imposter syndrome prevent you from applying!

*SaleCycle is committed to providing a caring work environment for all employees, regardless of age, sex, disability, sexual orientation, race, religion, or belief.*

*When it comes to recruitment, we’re interested in your work experience, skills, and overall personality. Because diversity makes the workplace stronger and is necessary for SaleCycle' success, we are intensifying efforts to incorporate concrete actions to help us improve in this area.*


**Salary Range**


For this position we offer a salary OTE between 80,000€ and 100,000€ gross per year \+ note that bonus are uncapped.
